title: Cursecraft
description: Curse minecraft with a ton of mods🕷️
body:
# Cursecraft🕷️

This modpack has lots of mods (not optimization) It is mainly for fun so I might not add versions often.

## Important info

- This is meant for **beefy** PCS, you might regret opening this on a potato.

- Ive not added any optimization mods. There are only the most cursed mods on the planet. 

- Dont make your fov too high 🤫

- Dont say i am steve in chat 😁

## Links
- [wiki](https://github.com/vencordthemer/Cursecraft/wiki)

- [issues](https://github.com/vencordthemer/Cursecraft/issues)
<details>
<summary>Mods (26)</summary>
  
### Core Utilities
- **Fabric API** by modmuss50
- **Cloth Config API** by shedaniel
- **Architectury API** by architectury
- **Fabric Language Kotlin** by modmuss50
- **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)** by isxander

### Visual & Aesthetic Enhancements
- **Blur+** by Motschen
- **Continuity** by PepperCode1
- **Falling Leaves** by randommcsomethin
- **Wavey Capes** by tr7zw
- **I .. am Steve** by Aznos
- **Nyan Cat Loading** by chw

### User Interface Improvements
- **Mod Menu** by Terraformers
- **Roughly Enough Items (REI)** by shedaniel
- **Jade** by Snownee
- **Better Mount HUD** by Lortseam
- **Slyde** by JFronny

### Audio Enhancements
- **Drip Sounds** by PieKing1215
- **Sounds** by IMB11

### Fun & Unique Additions
- **Villager In A Bucket** by JustDoom
- **Physics Mod** by haubna
- **Capes** by caelthecolher
- **playerAnimator** by KosmX

### Developer Tools
- **Text Placeholder API** by Patbox
- **LibJF** by JFronny
- **M.R.U** by 

yes, i used ai to generate this...


</details>
